endpoints.name: GET /api/lab_documents
endpoints.description: Retrieve or search lab order documents
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DRCHRONO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your DRCHRONO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /api/lab_documents
endpoints.description:
Create lab order documents. An example lab workflow is as following:

- When you get orders, submit them via `/api/lab_orders`, such that doctors can see them in drchrono.

- When results come in, submit the result document PDF via `/api/lab_documents` and submit the results data via `/api/lab_results`

- Update `/api/lab_orders` status
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DRCHRONO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your DRCHRONO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.description: Retrieve an existing lab order document
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DRCHRONO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your DRCHRONO ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/sublabs
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DRCHRONO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your DRCHRONO ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /api/sublabs
endpoints.description:
Create sub-vendors

- When you get orders, submit them via `/api/lab_orders`, such that doctors can see them in drchrono.

- When results come in, submit the result document PDF via `/api/lab_documents` and submit the results data via `/api/lab_results`

- Update `/api/lab_orders` status
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DRCHRONO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your DRCHRONO ACCESS TOKEN.
